reason: While the change is a configuration update to rsyslog, enabling encryption (StreamDriverMode 1) requires that the receiving log server is also configured to accept encrypted connections and that the necessary TLS certificates/keys are correctly provisioned on the local system. If the remote destination is not ready for TLS, log transmission will fail, potentially leading to a loss of audit visibility.
estimated_impact: networking affected; Potential loss of remote log transmission if TLS is not configured on the destination; Dependency on gnutls/openssl libraries and valid certificates; Service disruption if rsyslog configuration syntax is incorrect
